name: Async Pipeline Main
description: Init shared counter + launch 4 preprocess workers. Each worker claims the next image index atomically, reads at 80ms pace, preprocesses in parallel, then serializes GPU inference via a named lock.

nodes.name: Init NextIndex=0
nodes.description: Shared atomic counter; workers increment to claim the next image

nodes.name: Init TotalCount
nodes.description: Total number of images to process (workers exit when NextIndex >= TotalCount)

nodes.name: Launch 4 Workers
nodes.description: Fan out 4 identical worker sub-flows; all share the same SharedFlowContext
